title: Minimum Number of K Consecutive Bit Flips
titleCn: K 连续位的最小翻转次数

testcases.input: nums = [0,1,0], k = 1 Output: 2 Explanation: Flip nums[0], then flip nums[2].
nums = [1,1,0], k = 2 Output: -1 Explanation: No matter how we flip subarrays of size 2, we cannot make the array become [1,1,1].
testcases.expectedOutput: -1 Explanation: No matter how we flip subarrays of size 2, we cannot make the array become [1,1,1].

testcases.input: nums = [0,0,0,1,0,1,1,0], k = 3 Output: 3 Explanation: Flip nums[0],nums[1],nums[2]: nums becomes [1,1,1,1,0,1,1,0] Flip nums[4],nums[5],nums[6]: nums becomes [1,1,1,1,1,0,0,0] Flip nums[5],nums[6],nums[7]: nums becomes [1,1,1,1,1,1,1,1]
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: Flip nums[0],nums[1],nums[2]: nums becomes [1,1,1,1,0,1,1,0] Flip nums[4],nums[5],nums[6]: nums becomes [1,1,1,1,1,0,0,0] Flip nums[5],nums[6],nums[7]: nums becomes [1,1,1,1,1,1,1,1]
